name: DADIR: Density-Aware Data-level Imbalanced Regression Framework
summary: arXiv:2607.17178v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Imbalanced learning addresses predictive modeling problems with underrepresented regions of the data distribution. Although widely studied in class...
description: arXiv:2607.17178v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Imbalanced learning addresses predictive modeling problems with underrepresented regions of the data distribution. Although widely studied in classification, imbalanced regression remains challenging because of continuous target variables and heterogeneous density distributions. Existing data-level methods often rely on fixed target partitioning...
author: Shermin Shahbazi, Hossein Mohammadi, Mohsen Afsharchi
